headline: The Google Pixel Watch 5 may have been spoiled by… the creator of Borderlands
summary: Google Pixel Watch 5 images reportedly leaked by Borderlands creator Randy Pitchford. He claimed a friend found the watch underwater while scuba diving. This offers an unexpected first look at the unreleased device.

headline: Pebblebee’s Halo can help track lost items and keep you safe, and it’s on sale for $50
summary: The Pebblebee Halo combines a Bluetooth tracker and personal safety device. It's ideal for travelers exploring on their own. Currently on sale for $49.99 ($10 off) at Amazon, its lowest price yet.

headline: This could be Windows’ M1 moment — but expect it to cost a ton
summary: Nvidia is entering the consumer laptop chip space with RTX Spark. This could be Windows' equivalent to Apple's M1 chip for performance and battery life. Expect these new Arm-based Windows laptops to come with a high price tag.

headline: Gemini’s new AI agent is about as good as Google’s demo
summary: Google's new "24/7" AI agent, Gemini Spark, shows impressive capabilities. It can be surprisingly good at performing tasks on your behalf. However, concerns remain about its financial cost and potential privacy tradeoffs.

headline: Expand Your Home Gym With This Adjustable Weight Bench for Just $41 Shipped on Amazon
summary: An adjustable weight bench is available for just $41, including shipping. This deal is perfect for complementing your dumbbell workouts. It's a great way to expand your home gym setup affordably.

headline: This 307-Piece LEGO Lord of the Rings Set Is Attached to a $650 Price Tag
summary: A 307-piece LEGO Lord of the Rings set has been revealed. The set comes with a significant price tag of $650. This highlights the premium cost often associated with collectible LEGO editions.

headline: Escape from New York Remake Finds Director and Writer in Zack Snyder
summary: Zack Snyder, known for 'Man of Steel' and '300', is set to write and direct the 'Escape from New York' remake. This marks a major development for the long-anticipated film project. Snyder will bring his distinctive style to the cult classic.

headline: Subnautica 2 Dev Addresses 'Misunderstanding' Around Decision Not to Let Players Kill Predators
summary: Subnautica 2's design lead clarified the decision to prevent players from killing predators. Anthony Gallegos explained the true intent behind the controversial gameplay choice. The developers aimed to address community misunderstanding regarding the feature.

headline: 'Beleaguered and bereft' - Mandelson messages reveal criticism of No 10
summary: Newly published documents reveal Lord Mandelson's criticism of No 10. Messages show concerns from Mandelson and other ministers about the prime minister. The communications also highlighted issues with Labour MPs.

headline: Chris Mason: Decision to appoint Mandelson continues to inflict damage
summary: Chris Mason suggests Sir Keir Starmer's appointment of Lord Mandelson to Washington caused lasting damage. This decision could be a central point of critique for Starmer's future tenure at No10. The article implies significant negative repercussions from the move.

headline: Weapons‑obsessed killer jailed as body cam footage shows victim being handcuffed
summary: A weapons-obsessed killer has been jailed for the murder of university student Henry Nowak. Nowak was killed returning from a night out in Southampton. Body camera footage reportedly shows the victim being handcuffed prior to his death.

headline: Lebanon says Hezbollah agrees reciprocal halt to attacks on Israel
summary: Lebanon announced Hezbollah has agreed to a reciprocal halt in attacks on Israel. Israeli PM Netanyahu warned strikes on Beirut would proceed if Hezbollah doesn't comply. The agreement is based on a US-proposed de-escalation plan.
